title: Teleport Master
description: This mod adds some commands for teleporting.
body:
This mod adds some commands for teleporting.

Usage: `/tpmaster <operation> [<arg1> <arg2> ...]`.

- `/tpmaster accept` - accept the teleport request you just received.
- `/tpmaster deny` - deny the teleport request you just received.
- `/tpmaster away [<distance> [<mustOnLand>]]` - randomly teleport you <distance> blocks away (disable <mustOnLand> to accept positions in water).
- `/tpmaster request <target> [ ask | invite ]` - create a teleport request that you ask <target> if you can teleport where <target> is, or you invite <target> to come to where you are.
- `/tpmaster spawn` - teleport to shared spawn point.
- `/tpmaster sethome [<index>]` - set your current location as your home <index>.
- `/tpmaster home [<index>]` - teleport to your home <index>.
- `/tpmaster back` - teleport back to your last death point.
- `/tpmaster remove home [<index>]` - remove your home <index>.
- `/tpmaster remove back` - remove your last death point.
- `/tpmaster help` - show help information.
